'''âz-w-b''' ('''zawaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teasle|teasle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teasle|teasle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| zawaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawabithi|zawabithi]] || [[word:zawabiji|zawabiji]] || [[word:zawabishi|zawabishi]] || [[word:zawabi|zawabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawabuthuth|zawabuthuth]] || [[word:zawabujuj|zawabujuj]] || [[word:zawabushush|zawabushush]] || [[word:zawab|zawab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawabuthu|zawabuthu]] || [[word:zawabuju|zawabuju]] || [[word:zawabushu|zawabushu]] || [[word:zawabu|zawabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawabufuth|zawabufuth]] || [[word:zawabufuj|zawabufuj]] || [[word:zawabufush|zawabufush]] || [[word:zawabuf|zawabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawabethe|zawabethe]] || [[word:zawabeje|zawabeje]] || [[word:zawabeshe|zawabeshe]] || [[word:zawabe|zawabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawabothoth|zawabothoth]] || [[word:zawabojoj|zawabojoj]] || [[word:zawaboshosh|zawaboshosh]] || [[word:zawab|zawab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawabotho|zawabotho]] || [[word:zawabojo|zawabojo]] || [[word:zawabosho|zawabosho]] || [[word:zawabo|zawabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawabofoth|zawabofoth]] || [[word:zawabofoj|zawabofoj]] || [[word:zawabofosh|zawabofosh]] || [[word:zawabof|zawabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zawabĂŠthĂŠ|zawabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zawabĂŠjĂŠ|zawabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zawabĂŠshĂŠ|zawabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zawabĂŠ|zawabĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zawabathath|zawabathath]] || [[word:zawabajaj|zawabajaj]] || [[word:zawabashash|zawabashash]] || [[word:zawab|zawab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zawabatha|zawabatha]] || [[word:zawabaja|zawabaja]] || [[word:zawabasha|zawabasha]] || [[word:zawaba|zawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zawabafath|zawabafath]] || [[word:zawabafaj|zawabafaj]] || [[word:zawabafash|zawabafash]] || [[word:zawabaf|zawabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zawabasha|zawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozawabasha|gozawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizawabasha|gokizawabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zawabnĂŒsha|zawabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozawabnknĂŒsha|gozawabnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizawabnĂŒsha|gokizawabnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zawabshĂ«sha|zawabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozawabnkshĂ«sha|gozawabnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizawabshĂ«sha|gokizawabshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawabrosha|zawabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawabnkrosha|gozawabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawabrosha|gokizawabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zawabmusha|zawabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawabnkmusha|gozawabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawabmusha|gokizawabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zawabsherasha|zawabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozawabnksherasha|gozawabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizawabsherasha|gokizawabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zawabngasha|zawabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozawabnkngasha|gozawabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizawabngasha|gokizawabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zawabyasha|zawabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozawabnkyasha|gozawabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizawabyasha|gokizawabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zawabyamasha|zawabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozawabnkyamasha|gozawabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizawabyamasha|gokizawabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawabnĂŒshĂ«sha|zawabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawabnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozawabnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawabnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizawabnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawabnĂŒrosha|zawabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawabnknĂŒrosha|gozawabnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawabnĂŒrosha|gokizawabnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawabnĂŒmusha|zawabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawabnknĂŒmusha|gozawabnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawabnĂŒmusha|gokizawabnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawabshĂ«nĂŒsha|zawabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozawabnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawabshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizawabshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawabshĂ«rosha|zawabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawabnkshĂ«rosha|gozawabnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawabshĂ«rosha|gokizawabshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawabshĂ«musha|zawabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawabnkshĂ«musha|gozawabnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawabshĂ«musha|gokizawabshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawabronĂŒsha|zawabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawabnkronĂŒsha|gozawabnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawabronĂŒsha|gokizawabronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawabroshĂ«sha|zawabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawabnkroshĂ«sha|gozawabnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawabroshĂ«sha|gokizawabroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zawabromusha|zawabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozawabnkromusha|gozawabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizawabromusha|gokizawabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zawabmunĂŒsha|zawabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozawabnkmunĂŒsha|gozawabnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizawabmunĂŒsha|gokizawabmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zawabmushĂ«sha|zawabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozawabnkmushĂ«sha|gozawabnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizawabmushĂ«sha|gokizawabmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zawabmurosha|zawabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozawabnkmurosha|gozawabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizawabmurosha|gokizawabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zawab|zawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠwĂŠb|zĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozawab|hozawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠwĂŠb|hozĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozawab|hohozawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠwĂŠb|hohozĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzawab|nĂŒzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠwĂŠb|nĂŒzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzawab|nĂŒnĂŒzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠwĂŠb|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzawab|nĂŻzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠwĂŠb|nĂŻzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzawab|nĂŻnĂŻzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠwĂŠb|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzawab|luzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠwĂŠb|luzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzawab|luluzawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠwĂŠb|luluzĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizawab|lizawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠwĂŠb|lizĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizawab|lilizawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠwĂŠb|lilizĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozawab|kozawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠwĂŠb|kozĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozawab|kokozawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠwĂŠb|kokozĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezawab|kezawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠwĂŠb|kezĂŠwĂŠb]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezawab|kekezawab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠwĂŠb|kekezĂŠwĂŠb]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
